description: Regex patterns for Nu HTML validator (vnu) error messages that are known, accepted artifacts of KaTeX's MathML/HTML output and must not fail the build. KaTeX emits a MathML accessibility layer (inside `<span class="katex-mathml"><math>…`) whose element set and inline styles the validator rejects; dropping that layer would remove screen-reader math support, so these are suppressed rather than 'fixed'. Every entry is a Python `re` pattern matched against the vnu message text and must state why it is unfixable in source. Do NOT add site-authored HTML bugs here — fix those at the source.

allow.reason: KaTeX MathML elements; the validator does not enter MathML foreign-content mode for KaTeX's markup and reports its elements as unknown.

allow.pattern: Element “(mrow|mo|mi|mn|ms|mtext|mspace|mpadded|mphantom|menclose|merror|maction|mfrac|msqrt|mroot|msub|msup|msubsup|munder|mover|munderover|mmultiscripts|mprescripts|mtable|mtr|mtd|mstyle|semantics|annotation)” not allowed as child of element
allow.reason: KaTeX MathML child nesting the validator rejects once it has left MathML mode.

allow.pattern: not allowed as child of element “(mrow|mo|mi|mn|ms|mtext|mfrac|msqrt|mroot|msub|msup|msubsup|munder|mover|munderover|mmultiscripts|mtable|mtr|mtd|mstyle|msubsup|semantics)”
allow.reason: KaTeX MathML parent nesting the validator rejects once it has left MathML mode.
KaTeX MathML presentation attributes (e.g. empty `columnspacing`, `mathcolor`) that the validator flags but browsers render.
KaTeX `.vlist` vertical-alignment shims use negative heights in inline styles; this is core to KaTeX's HTML rendering.
